title: Escaped identifiers of VPI variable names have extra space

features.name: escaped identifier in module instantiation name
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where the module name is an escaped identifier containing special characters

features.name: escaped identifier in wire declaration
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration using an escaped identifier with special characters like plus sign

features.name: escaped identifier in port connection
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation with port connections using escaped identifiers for both the instance name and connection names
